Interface IEpipolarXform2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to additional epipolar tranforamtion operations.

[Guid("508BA9AE-366C-4D7E-A0FD-D12F8E05690B")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IEpipolarXform2 : IEpipolarXform, IGeodataXform
